prompt: What happens if I delete the app?
completion: Your data might be lost! Make sure to back up or export if needed before deleting.
Check your settings! There might be cloud backup options to keep your data safe.

prompt: Can I use this on multiple devices?
completion: If you have an account, you should be able to sync across devices. Check login options!

prompt: How do I change my name?
completion: Look in profile or account settings! You should be able to update your display name there.
If we have one, it's where you can spend coins you've earned! Check for rewards or customizations.
Level up by being consistent! Completing goals, maintaining streaks, and finishing quests all add up.
Check your profile! Your level reflects how engaged you've been with the app.
Usually not! Your level reflects your overall progress. Keep going to climb higher.

prompt: What do I get at higher levels?
completion: Usually bragging rights and maybe new badges! Check what unlocks as you progress.
There should be an onboarding or help section! Look for tips or walkthroughs in settings.
Usually in settings or the menu. Look for FAQ, Help, or Support options!
Check settings for a support or contact option! There should be a way to reach out.
Definitely! Look for a feedback option in settings. We love hearing from users.
Check for an updates or changelog section! New features get added regularly.
Maybe! Explore around and you might discover cool things. The best features are the ones you use.
